title: eumorpha nobilis
side_effects: Eumorpha nobilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use of the Eumorpha nobilis plant can cause cardiac problems, including arrhythmia and palpitations. It is essential to handle and use the plant with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
